creator: bruce.richardson@intel.com
text: In terms of the other architectures: If I remove the restriction on the single architecture, what would happen then? Would there be a set of bug reports generated for the failing architectures, or what would the usual process be for making - and more importantly testing - those failing arch's. I don't actually have any non-intel systems available to me right now, but I can probably request help from others in the DPDK community to fix up arm or PPC builds if I can point them at an easy-to-process set of issues encountered.
